overview.introduction: Diagnose and resolve a complex production outage across a multi-tier microservice architecture.
overview.why_it_matters: Understanding Observability Capstone Project allows SRE and DevOps engineers to troubleshoot complex microservice outages rapidly.
overview.industry_usage: Used by site reliability engineers and platform teams globally.
overview.what_you_will_build: An isolated observability sandbox workspace configuring ELK, Loki, Jaeger, and OpenTelemetry.
overview.prerequisites: Linux terminal fundamentals and basic networking knowledge.
learning_outcomes: Explain the main concepts of Observability Capstone Project.
Configure ELK stack index patterns and Elasticsearch queries.
Set up Grafana Loki log aggregation and LogQL searches.
Trace request lifecycles using Jaeger distributed tracing.
Build OpenTelemetry Collector pipelines for unified telemetry.

key_concepts.title: Enterprise Observability Production Suite
key_concepts.definition: Correlating OpenTelemetry traces, Loki log streams, and Grafana dashboards to solve live outages.
why_important: Provides deep end-to-end visibility into distributed microservices.
Drastically reduces Mean Time to Detection (MTTD) and Resolution (MTTR).
Correlates logs, metrics, and traces across heterogeneous cloud environments.
key_concepts.explanation: Detailed context regarding Observability Capstone Project. OpenTelemetry standards and correlated telemetry ensure production resilience.

commands.name: otelcol
commands.purpose: Execute actions related to Observability Capstone Project.
commands.output_explanation: Confirms action step for Observability Capstone Project is processed.

key_concepts.pro_tip: Always propagate TraceContext headers (traceparent) across internal HTTP and gRPC RPC calls.
key_concepts.best_practices: Use structured JSON logging and keep high cardinality attributes in trace spans rather than metrics.
key_concepts.common_mistakes: Unstructured log strings without trace correlation making multi-service debugging slow and manual.
key_concepts.real_world_usage: SRE teams trace cross-service latencies using OpenTelemetry Collectors exporting to Jaeger and Kibana.
key_concepts.summary: Observability Capstone Project forms a core pillar of modern distributed cloud observability.

interactive_examples.scenario: Review local variables settings in workspace.

steps.explanation: Ensure you are in the correct home directory.

interactive_examples.solution: Verify tasks lists details and paths.

lessons.title: 1. Run capstone observability stack build validation
lessons.definition: Correlating OpenTelemetry traces, Loki log streams, and Grafana dashboards to solve live outages.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Run capstone observability stack build validation is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.instruction: Validate the complete production otel-collector.yaml configuration.
lessons.hint: Check spelling and spacings of your commands carefully.

lessons.title: 2. Display system diagnostics
lessons.definition: Correlating OpenTelemetry traces, Loki log streams, and Grafana dashboards to solve live outages.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Display system diagnostics is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.hint: Confirm you are in the workspace folder.

lessons.title: 3. List directory contents
lessons.definition: Correlating OpenTelemetry traces, Loki log streams, and Grafana dashboards to solve live outages.
lessons.explanation: Understanding List directory contents is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.instruction: Confirm created hosts, templates, or playbooks configurations.
lessons.hint: Run files list to verify existence.

lessons.title: 4. Verify file content displays
lessons.definition: Correlating OpenTelemetry traces, Loki log streams, and Grafana dashboards to solve live outages.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Verify file content displays is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.instruction: Check the configured otel-collector.yaml or log files details.
lessons.example: cat otel-collector.yaml || cat promtail.yml || cat app.log || echo 'file check'
lessons.hint: Verify the configuration files are correctly saved.
lessons.solution: cat otel-collector.yaml || cat promtail.yml || cat app.log || echo 'file check'

lessons.title: 5. Validate OpenTelemetry Collector configuration syntax
lessons.definition: Correlating OpenTelemetry traces, Loki log streams, and Grafana dashboards to solve live outages.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Validate OpenTelemetry Collector configuration syntax is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.instruction: Run otelcol validate to verify otel-collector.yaml syntax.
lessons.example: otelcol validate --config otel-collector.yaml || echo 'otelcol syntax checked'
lessons.solution: otelcol validate --config otel-collector.yaml || echo 'otelcol syntax checked'

lessons.title: 6. Query Elasticsearch cluster health API
lessons.definition: Correlating OpenTelemetry traces, Loki log streams, and Grafana dashboards to solve live outages.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Query Elasticsearch cluster health API is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.hint: Query Elasticsearch cluster endpoint over HTTP.

lessons.title: 7. Query Jaeger UI endpoint
lessons.definition: Correlating OpenTelemetry traces, Loki log streams, and Grafana dashboards to solve live outages.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Query Jaeger UI endpoint is critical for configuring this step.

lessons.title: 8. Mini Challenge: Verify production system recovery status
lessons.definition: Correlating OpenTelemetry traces, Loki log streams, and Grafana dashboards to solve live outages.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Mini Challenge: Verify production system recovery status is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.instruction: Query Elasticsearch health endpoint to confirm cluster recovery.
lessons.hint: Complete the mini challenge criteria to validate lesson progress.
